notes.what_learned: Set up Pyramid environment and explored the admin console. Learned basic navigation between models, datasets, and dashboards. Reviewed the difference between live connections and imported data.
notes.evidence_produced: Captured screenshots of the Pyramid admin console and model explorer. Saved as initial evidence artifacts.
notes.what_remains: Need to complete the full data connection walkthrough. Dataset import still pending.
notes.next_step: Complete the data connection tutorial and import sample data.

notes.what_learned: Installed Codex toolkit and configured the development environment. Learned about the Codex loop: prompt → generate → review → refine. Ran first guided prompt successfully.
notes.evidence_produced: Screenshot of Codex CLI running first prompt. Log file of the generation output.
notes.what_remains: Need to understand how to scope changes effectively. Still unsure about change isolation workflow.
notes.next_step: Practice change-slice scoping with a sample task.

ai-copilot.label: AI & Copilot
ai-copilot.description: Chat modes, prompt engineering, custom instructions, context management, tool use. Learners practice mode selection, prompt structure, and drift avoidance.

codex.label: Codex Productivity
codex.description: Workflow orientation, handoff fluency, context synthesis, targeted AI use, bounded automation, Codex loop mastery (Pull → Summarize → Identify → Execute → Record).

pyramid.label: Pyramid Platform
pyramid.description: Model logic, deployment sequencing, QC, security, artifact movement, reviewer access. Learners build deployment checklists and QC evidence packs.

bi-judgment.label: BI Judgment
bi-judgment.description: Business reasoning, metric definition, grain, validation, trusted delivery, tool-agnostic thinking. Learners articulate business questions and validate metrics.

data-lineage.label: Data & Lineage
data-lineage.description: Source-to-model lineage, aggregation, rollups, snapshots, dependency mapping, row ownership. Learners trace dependencies and map data flows.

delivery-handoff.label: Delivery & Handoff
delivery-handoff.description: Change isolation, review packages, handoff drafting, reusable assets, reviewer readiness. Learners prepare change charters and review packages.

readiness.label: Retention & Readiness
readiness.description: Weekly retention checks, scorecards, proof tasks, Codex Gate, readiness classification. Learners self-assess across all tracks and track progress.

1.label: Foundation
1.subtitle: For complete amateurs — no prior experience needed. Learn vocabulary and basic concepts with maximum guidance.

2.label: Development
2.subtitle: For learners with some experience — build competence through guided application and practice.

3.label: Operational
3.subtitle: For confident practitioners — deep concepts with significant independence and quality focus.

4.label: Mastery
4.subtitle: For expert-ready learners — advanced optimization, automation, and strategic thinking with full autonomy.

ai-copilot.description: What is an AI coding assistant? Learn to chat, ask simple questions, and understand basic responses. No prior experience needed — just curiosity.

codex.description: Introduction to the Codex workflow. Learn what the Codex Loop is and practice following simple guided prompts step by step.

pyramid.description: What is a data platform? Learn basic vocabulary — models, deployments, QC — and see examples of each. Build awareness of the analytics ecosystem.

bi-judgment.description: What is business intelligence? Learn to identify simple business questions and understand what metrics are at a basic level.

data-lineage.description: What is data lineage? Learn where data comes from and where it goes. Build simple dependency awareness and follow data flows.

delivery-handoff.description: What does it mean to deliver work? Learn about change tracking, review concepts, and why communication matters.

readiness.description: How do we track learning? Learn about progress tracking, simple check-ins, and basic self-assessment of your own work.

ai-copilot.description: Move beyond basic chat. Learn to craft clear prompts, switch modes intentionally, and use Copilot for guided task execution.

codex.description: Build Codex Loop fluency. Practice pulling context, summarizing state, and identifying next steps using the Codex patterns.

pyramid.description: Apply Pyramid vocabulary to real models. Trace model logic, identify surfaces, and understand deployment mechanics.

bi-judgment.description: Apply BI reasoning to guided tasks. Practice defining metrics, identifying grain, and validating simple outputs.

data-lineage.description: Map real data flows from source through transformation to output. Identify dependencies and downstream impacts.

delivery-handoff.description: Prepare review packages and draft handoff notes. Learn change-slice scoping and reviewer communication.

readiness.description: Track weekly progress against proof tasks. Self-assess across tracks and identify gaps before gates.

ai-copilot.description: Use Copilot as a thought partner. Drive complex workflows with structured prompts, custom instructions, and prompt files.

codex.description: Use Codex autonomously for validation, quality control, and handoff preparation. Apply patterns 1–7 independently.

pyramid.description: Independently manage deployment preflight, QC execution, and artifact movement across environments.

bi-judgment.description: Independently validate metrics and business logic. Detect grain mismatches, filter errors, and double-counting risks.

data-lineage.description: Analyze complex lineage chains with multiple sources, transformations, and rollup paths. Validate dependencies independently.

delivery-handoff.description: Own the end-to-end delivery process: change charter, review package, handoff, and reviewer follow-up.

readiness.description: Demonstrate operational readiness through completed proof tasks and consistent scorecard performance.

ai-copilot.description: Design and share reusable prompt libraries. Teach others prompt discipline and context management strategies.

codex.description: Create reusable Codex patterns for the team. Evaluate Codex vs. manual workflows and make strategic tool choices.

pyramid.description: Design deployment strategies, write QC standards, and mentor others on platform operations and artifact management.

bi-judgment.description: Mentor others on BI judgment. Review metric definitions, validate logic chains, and set quality standards.

data-lineage.description: Design lineage documentation standards and mentor others on dependency mapping and impact analysis.

delivery-handoff.description: Define delivery standards, review handoff quality, and mentor others on effective reviewer communication.

readiness.description: Certify others’ readiness, design gate criteria, and continuously improve the MUE framework based on delivery outcomes.
